key_learnings: Substituting ingredients can significantly alter both macronutrient profiles and palatability.
research_findings: Reducing added sugars by 25% in recipes is achievable with minimal taste impact.
current_focus_areas: Developing algorithms to optimize recipes for multiple nutritional goals simultaneously.

learning_log.entry: Learning phase started. Analysed ingredient substitution impact on macronutrients and palatability scores. Reporting daily progress to Copilot.

copilot_learning_requests: reducing added sugar in recipes without taste loss
fibre enrichment techniques for common recipes
portion adjustment and scaling best practices
user preference learning for recipe personalisation
collaboration_notes: Bot 5 actively asks Copilot for recipe optimization topics. Copilot directs learning toward improving nutritional outcomes while preserving taste. All progress is reported to Copilot daily.
